hero.title: Launch a product site that reads from JSON
hero.subtitle: Swap headlines, buttons, pricing, and product data without touching React. Keep auth, dashboard, and content updates fast.

sections.title: Codex keeps the workflow tight
sections.body: Write in JSON, ship in React. Codex connects your content, product data, and dashboard modules so you can ship fast without losing structure.

sections.title: Marketing and product data stay aligned
sections.body: Designers update messaging, product teams update specs, and everything renders consistently across pages.
bullets: Single source of truth for product copy

features.title: Config-driven landing page
features.description: Hero copy, stats, testimonials, and FAQs live in JSON so your site stays agile.

features.title: Auth and dashboard baked in
features.description: Sign-in, sign-up, and a dashboard shell are ready for your product team.

features.title: Composable product blocks
features.description: Highlight multiple products, tiers, and add-ons without changing components.

features.title: Ship faster with Codex
features.description: Codex keeps your content, product data, and marketing surfaces synced.

testimonials.quote: We swapped the entire site copy in one afternoon without touching components.
testimonials.name: Avery Chen

testimonials.quote: The dashboard skeleton saved us a sprint and made sales demos easy.
testimonials.name: Miles Ortiz

testimonials.quote: Marketing and product teams finally share the same source of truth.
testimonials.name: Rhea Patel

faq.question: Where do I edit the copy?
faq.answer: Update the JSON files in /config and the UI changes instantly.

faq.question: Can I add more products or tiers?
faq.answer: Yes. Add to products.json and pricing sections render automatically.

faq.question: Do I need to touch the auth flow?
faq.answer: No. Convex Auth is wired, with redirects defined in auth.json.
